summary: Stage43/44 did not produce external PASS.
Stage44 ruled out internal checkpoint selection collapse as the proximate cause.
The composer path is operational after Stage43-C2 shadow export fixes.
The remaining issue is controlled-to-naturalistic generalization failure, especially SUPPORT/REFUTE entitlement collapse under external-style evidence.
Stage43-B1 must not be used for further optimization.

allowed_uses: one clearly labeled diagnostic comparison if absolutely necessary, but not as final validation
stage43b1_lock_policy.future_final_validation_requirement: Acquire a new held-out external set after Stage45 redesign is frozen.

allowed_inputs: historical Stage43/44 high-level diagnosis without examples, thresholds, per-example predictions, or tuning signals

option_a_internal_controlled_naturalizat.summary: Generate more naturalistic claim/evidence phrasing from internal controlled examples only.
requirements: split before augmentation to avoid train/dev leakage
include paraphrase, sentence-length variation, distractor insertion, entity aliasing, and evidence-style variation
do not copy or imitate Stage43-B1 examples

option_b_entitlement_balance_loss_auxili.summary: Add an internal-only auxiliary objective to protect SUPPORT/REFUTE entitlement against over-conservative NOT_ENTITLED gating.
requirements: avoid unless diagnostics show gating/loss is the main bottleneck

option_c_internal_leave_transformation_f.summary: Hold out transformation families internally and select checkpoints by robustness across held-out internal transformation types.

option_d_evidence_sufficiency_contrast_c.summary: Construct internal contrast pairs where minimal evidence changes flip SUPPORT/REFUTE/NOT_ENTITLED.
requirements: preserve traceable labels and family metadata

option_e_new_external_holdout_acquisitio.summary: Acquire a new external validation set after Stage45 design is frozen for final claims only.
requirements: not used for thresholding, calibration, checkpoint selection, data generation, or model selection

recommended_path.primary: Option C + Option D first: internal leave-family-out validation plus evidence sufficiency contrast curriculum.
recommended_path.secondary: Option A only if implemented with strict split-before-augmentation.
recommended_path.avoid_initially: Option B unless diagnostics show gating/loss is the main bottleneck, because loss changes can hide leakage-like overfitting to internal dev.

stage45b_plan.name: internal leave-transformation-family-out validation scaffold
reports: unsafe SUPPORT proxy on internal controlled families

stage45c_plan.name: evidence sufficiency contrast curriculum or auxiliary diagnostic
stage45c_plan.selection_policy: select only by internal leave-family-out criteria
stage45c_plan.focus: minimal evidence changes that flip SUPPORT/REFUTE/NOT_ENTITLED boundaries

future_external_eval_policy.stage43b1_final_claim_status: not clean final validation after redesign informed by its failure
future_external_eval_policy.if_stage43b1_reused_label: previously observed diagnostic set, not clean validation

internal_success_criteria: NOT_ENTITLED prediction rate consistent with internal gold priors
no increase in unsafe SUPPORT proxy
external_success_criteria: final external success requires a new held-out dataset after design freeze
allowed_claims: Stage45-A defines an internal-only generalization redesign plan.
Stage43-B1 remains locked and cannot guide future optimization.
Stage44 ruled out internal checkpoint selection as the proximate cause.
Future redesign must be validated internally first.
disallowed_claims: Do not claim VitaminC transfer success.
Do not claim Stage45 will solve the external failure.
Do not use Stage43-B1 as a clean final validation set after redesign.
